'''âs-ng-p''' ('''kasangap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stagecoach|stagecoach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stagecoach|stagecoach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ng-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasangap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisangap|thisangap]] || [[word:jisangap|jisangap]] || [[word:shisangap|shisangap]] || [[word:kisangap|kisangap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusangap|thuthusangap]] || [[word:jujusangap|jujusangap]] || [[word:shushusangap|shushusangap]] || [[word:kukusangap|kukusangap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusangap|thusangap]] || [[word:jusangap|jusangap]] || [[word:shusangap|shusangap]] || [[word:kusangap|kusangap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusangap|thusangap]] || [[word:jusangap|jusangap]] || [[word:shusangap|shusangap]] || [[word:kusangap|kusangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesangap|thesangap]] || [[word:jesangap|jesangap]] || [[word:shesangap|shesangap]] || [[word:kesangap|kesangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosangap|thothosangap]] || [[word:jojosangap|jojosangap]] || [[word:shoshosangap|shoshosangap]] || [[word:kokosangap|kokosangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosangap|thosangap]] || [[word:josangap|josangap]] || [[word:shosangap|shosangap]] || [[word:kosangap|kosangap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosangap|thosangap]] || [[word:josangap|josangap]] || [[word:shosangap|shosangap]] || [[word:kosangap|kosangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsangap|thĂŠsangap]] || [[word:jĂŠsangap|jĂŠsangap]] || [[word:shĂŠsangap|shĂŠsangap]] || [[word:kĂŠsangap|kĂŠsangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasangap|thathasangap]] || [[word:jajasangap|jajasangap]] || [[word:shashasangap|shashasangap]] || [[word:kakasangap|kakasangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasangap|thasangap]] || [[word:jasangap|jasangap]] || [[word:shasangap|shasangap]] || [[word:kasangap|kasangap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasangap|thasangap]] || [[word:jasangap|jasangap]] || [[word:shasangap|shasangap]] || [[word:kasangap|kasangap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasangap|shasangap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasangap|goshasangap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasangap|gokishasangap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasangapnĂŒ|shasangapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasangapnknĂŒ|goshasangapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangapnĂŒ|gokishasangapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasangapshĂ«|shasangapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasangapnkshĂ«|goshasangapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasangapshĂ«|gokishasangapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangapro|shasangapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangapnkro|goshasangapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangapro|gokishasangapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangapmu|shasangapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangapnkmu|goshasangapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangapmu|gokishasangapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasangapsher|shasangapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasangapnksher|goshasangapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasangapsher|gokishasangapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasangapng|shasangapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasangapnkng|goshasangapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasangapng|gokishasangapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasangapya|shasangapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasangapnkya|goshasangapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasangapya|gokishasangapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasangapyam|shasangapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasangapnkyam|goshasangapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasangapyam|gokishasangapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangapnĂŒshĂ«|shasangapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasangapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasangapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangapnĂŒro|shasangapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangapnknĂŒro|goshasangapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangapnĂŒro|gokishasangapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangapnĂŒmu|shasangapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangapnknĂŒmu|goshasangapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangapnĂŒmu|gokishasangapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangapshĂ«nĂŒ|shasangapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasangapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasangapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangapshĂ«ro|shasangapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangapnkshĂ«ro|goshasangapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangapshĂ«ro|gokishasangapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangapshĂ«mu|shasangapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangapnkshĂ«mu|goshasangapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangapshĂ«mu|gokishasangapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangapronĂŒ|shasangapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangapnkronĂŒ|goshasangapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangapronĂŒ|gokishasangapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangaproshĂ«|shasangaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangapnkroshĂ«|goshasangapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangaproshĂ«|gokishasangaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangapromu|shasangapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangapnkromu|goshasangapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangapromu|gokishasangapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangapmunĂŒ|shasangapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangapnkmunĂŒ|goshasangapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangapmunĂŒ|gokishasangapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangapmushĂ«|shasangapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangapnkmushĂ«|goshasangapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangapmushĂ«|gokishasangapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangapmuro|shasangapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangapnkmuro|goshasangapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangapmuro|gokishasangapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
